name: Antinomy Artifact
description: Notes This is an Antinomy Gear item.
effects: On Ability Use: Summons a Duality creature that heals up to 10 players for 200 HP once and then applies healing to surrounding players for 6 seconds in a 4 tile radius. Dark: 100-150 Damage Light: 400 Damage Cooldown: 25 seconds
